case_title: BATES SHIRLEY VS BAKER AMANDA CARE OF KETCHUM COMMUNICATIONS

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BAKER AMANDA CARE OF KETCHUM COMMUNICATIONS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,312.87 FILED BY BATES SHIRLEY AS TO DEFENDANT BAKER AMANDA CARE OF KETCHUM COMMUNICATIONS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-24-1988 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
